scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix admin"
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix admin && npm run build --prefix backend && node scripts/copy-app-static.js
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix admin
